title: armeria malacitana
intro: Armeria malacitana, also known as the Malacitan thrift or Malacitan sea thrift, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its small, pink to purple flowers and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Armeria malacitana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
